basics.name: Shamsiddin Nabiev
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior software engineer with 5+ years building real-time, cloud-native data platforms — Apache Flink stream processing on AWS, with full-stack and observability depth. Two MSc degrees (Software Engineering, AI).

work.name: Autodesk
highlights: Design and operate Apache Flink streaming applications for a real-time change-data-capture (CDC) data platform on AWS (Managed Flink, Kafka/MSK, Kinesis), powering producer and consumer pipelines across the org.
Led full-chain distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry and Dynatrace, propagating trace context through Flink operators to close observability gaps and cut incident-diagnosis time.
Contribute reusable connectors, operators, and instrumentation to shared Flink platform libraries used across multiple producer/consumer applications.

work.name: Autodesk
highlights: Built high-throughput streaming pipelines in Java on Apache Flink, integrating Kafka (MSK) and Amazon Kinesis for real-time change-data-capture and delivery.
Authored Terraform infrastructure-as-code for Managed Flink and Kafka; owned CI/CD via Jenkins, Spinnaker, Docker, and an internal Kubernetes platform.
Developed a Spring Boot control-plane service orchestrating Kafka resource provisioning (backed by DynamoDB), plus event-driven Node.js services and React/TypeScript front-ends.
Diagnosed and fixed production issues in stateful streaming jobs (serialization, checkpointing, performance); maintained rigorous test coverage with JUnit, Mockito, and JaCoCo.

work.name: Autodesk
highlights: Built full-stack features with Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, React, and Svelte; created modular Node.js services and used Docker and Jenkins for streamlined delivery.

work.name: VEON
highlights: Built microservices and full-stack applications with Node.js, Spring Boot, and MongoDB, collaborating cross-functionally on design, implementation, and integration.

work.name: VEON
highlights: Delivered big-data analytics and targeted-marketing platforms; administered mission-critical billing systems with Bash, SQL, Perl, Python, and Oracle SQL on Linux, automating tasks and resolving performance issues.
